approved_command_preview: Patch PR #281 current head 652a78cf8a727c719a87151b5276776c5c77adab for the two unresolved external review findings about unquoted header expression redaction and curl credentials split across shell line continuations. The command verifies the exact branch head and the current script/selftest blob SHAs, updates only scripts/openrouter_pr_review.py and scripts/openrouter_pr_review_selftest.py, runs py_compile, the offline selftest, git diff checks, commits to the PR branch, pushes with the bridged GitHub token, and leaves PR #281 draft. No external Codex request, slash command, or ready-for-review transition is posted.
